query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A low-angle view of a teal-green sky filled with soft cumulus clouds, with the dark silhouettes of leafy tree branches occupying the lower left corner. Multiple overlapping circular light artifacts—rainbow-edged lens flares in gold, orange, and green—dominate the center and left portion of the frame, created by bright sunlight passing through the camera optics.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A lo-fi, snapshot-style photograph shot upward through tree branches at a green-tinged sky with milky clouds, featuring prominent analog-style light leak streaks and multiple large circular lens flares with rainbow chromatic edges bleeding across the frame. The image has a dreamy, unfocused softness throughout, with deliberately casual framing that feels like an accidental capture, evoking vintage film photography imperfection and unplanned vernacular energy.
